response.justification: Candidate is an accomplished full-stack engineer with strong web/backend experience, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute/storage/hardware focus. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015) and no cloud compute platform or distributed-systems-at-scale leadership experience. Primary stack is TypeScript/Node/DLang, which does not satisfy the hard minimums for this Technical Lead position.
strengths: Long tenure at high-caliber companies (Stripe, Shopify, Datadog)
Mentoring/teaching track record via workshops, dojos, and courses
Polyglot engineer comfortable across web, embedded, and systems work
concerns: Far short of 8 years C++ experience (only ~6 months at NI)
No demonstrated large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed systems leadership
No formal technical-lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at required scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / distributed systems scale
